verses.latin_vulgate: Huic David, quando terra ejus restituta est.   Dominus regnavit : exsultet terra ;  lætentur insulæ multæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְהֹוָ֣ה מָ֭לָךְ תָּגֵ֣ל הָאָ֑רֶץ יִ֝שְׂמְח֗וּ אִיִּ֥ים רַבִּֽים׃
verses.king_james: The Lord reigneth; let the earth rejoice; let the multitude of isles be glad thereof.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nubes et caligo in circuitu ejus ;  justitia et judicium correctio sedis ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עָנָ֣ן וַעֲרָפֶ֣ל סְבִיבָ֑יו צֶ֥דֶק וּ֝מִשְׁפָּ֗ט מְכ֣וֹן כִּסְאֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: Clouds and darkness are round about him: righteousness and judgment are the habitation of his throne.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ignis ante ipsum præcedet,  et inflammabit in circuitu inimicos ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֵ֭שׁ לְפָנָ֣יו תֵּלֵ֑ךְ וּתְלַהֵ֖ט סָבִ֣יב צָרָֽיו׃
verses.king_james: A fire goeth before him, and burneth up his enemies round about.

verses.latin_vulgate: Illuxerunt fulgura ejus orbi terræ ;  vidit, et commota est terra.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֵאִ֣ירוּ בְרָקָ֣יו תֵּבֵ֑ל רָאֲתָ֖ה וַתָּחֵ֣ל הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.king_james: His lightnings enlightened the world: the earth saw, and trembled.

verses.latin_vulgate: Montes sicut cera fluxerunt a facie Domini ;  a facie Domini omnis terra.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הָרִ֗ים כַּדּוֹנַ֗ג נָ֭מַסּוּ מִלִּפְנֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֑ה מִ֝לִּפְנֵ֗י אֲד֣וֹן כׇּל־הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.king_james: The hills melted like wax at the presence of the Lord, at the presence of the Lord of the whole earth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Annuntiaverunt cæli justitiam ejus,  et viderunt omnes populi gloriam ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הִגִּ֣ידוּ הַשָּׁמַ֣יִם צִדְק֑וֹ וְרָא֖וּ כׇל־הָעַמִּ֣ים כְּבוֹדֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: The heavens declare his righteousness, and all the people see his glory.

verses.latin_vulgate: Confundantur omnes qui adorant sculptilia,  et qui gloriantur in simulacris suis.  Adorate eum omnes angeli ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יֵבֹ֤שׁוּ ׀ כׇּל־עֹ֬בְדֵי פֶ֗סֶל הַמִּֽתְהַלְלִ֥ים בָּאֱלִילִ֑ים הִשְׁתַּחֲווּ־ל֝֗וֹ כׇּל־אֱלֹהִֽים׃
verses.king_james: Confounded be all they that serve graven images, that boast themselves of idols: worship him, all ye gods.

verses.latin_vulgate: Audivit, et lætata est Sion,  et exsultaverunt filiæ Judæ  propter judicia tua, Domine.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שָׁמְעָ֬ה וַתִּשְׂמַ֨ח ׀ צִיּ֗וֹן וַ֭תָּגֵלְנָה בְּנ֣וֹת יְהוּדָ֑ה לְמַ֖עַן מִשְׁפָּטֶ֣יךָ יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.king_james: Zion heard, and was glad; and the daughters of Judah rejoiced because of thy judgments, O Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam tu Dominus altissimus super omnem terram ;  nimis exaltatus es super omnes deos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־אַתָּ֤ה יְהֹוָ֗ה עֶלְי֥וֹן עַל־כׇּל־הָאָ֑רֶץ מְאֹ֥ד נַ֝עֲלֵ֗יתָ עַל־כׇּל־אֱלֹהִֽים׃
verses.king_james: For thou, Lord, art high above all the earth: thou art exalted far above all gods.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui diligitis Dominum, odite malum :  custodit Dominus animas sanctorum suorum ;  de manu peccatoris liberabit eos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֹֽהֲבֵ֥י יְהֹוָ֗ה שִׂנְא֫וּ־רָ֥ע שֹׁ֭מֵר נַפְשׁ֣וֹת חֲסִידָ֑יו מִיַּ֥ד רְ֝שָׁעִ֗ים יַצִּילֵֽם׃
verses.king_james: Ye that love the Lord, hate evil: he preserveth the souls of his saints; he delivereth them out of the hand of the wicked.

verses.latin_vulgate: Lux orta est justo,  et rectis corde lætitia.
verses.king_james: Light is sown for the righteous, and gladness for the upright in heart.

verses.latin_vulgate: Lætamini, justi, in Domino,  et confitemini memoriæ sanctificationis ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שִׂמְח֣וּ צַ֭דִּיקִים בַּיהֹוָ֑ה וְ֝הוֹד֗וּ לְזֵ֣כֶר קׇדְשֽׁוֹ׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: Rejoice in the Lord, ye righteous; and give thanks at the remembrance of his holiness.
